segment.source: Renders a two-column section with an eyebrow badge, heading, rich-text introduction, one supporting image, and an optional CTA button. Use it for: company introduction paragraphs, 'who we are' sections, mission-style copy paired with an office or team photo, career-page invitations. Prefer 'Brand Story' for longer narrative company history, 'Split Text & Media' for generic text-plus-image content, and 'Team Section' when individual people are listed.
